title: More Robits for Mekanism
description: Adds a few simple skins to the Mekanism Robit.
body:
This mod adds a few simple skins to the Mekanism Robit.

They come in solid Red, Orange, Yellow, Green, Cyan, Blue, Purple and Pink colors.

## Credits & License

This mod is licensed under the MIT license.

Credit goes to the authors of Mekanism for their amazing mod.
